title: runWithOwner
description: Runs a function under a specific reactive owner. Required for creating effects in async callbacks.
signature: runWithOwner<T>(owner: Owner | null, fn: () => T): T | undefined
param_owner_desc: The owner scope to run under. Get this from <0>getOwner()</0>. Accepts <1>null</1>.
param_fn_desc: Function to run. Any effects/cleanups created inside are owned by <0>owner</0>.
info_async_owner: After <0>await</0> or inside callbacks, the reactive owner is lost. Capture it synchronously with <1>getOwner()</1> and restore it with <2>runWithOwner()</2>.
